title: Faithfull Soft-Grip Notched Floor / Wall Tile Trowel for Applying Adhesive, Stainless Steel Blade 280 x 115mm (11 x 4.5") - 6mm Notch
features: Applications - Designed for applying and spreading adhesive or mortar prior to the setting of wall or floor tiles, the Faithfull Notched Trowel provides efficient coverage, faster work, and improved bonding for various construction and renovation tasks.

High-Quality Blade with 6mm Notches - The blade is crafted from high-quality stainless steel for smooth and clean application, whilst offering maximum durability and longevity. The 6mm notches evenly spread adhesives and mortar across surfaces with good coverage and controlled application without excessive build-up, ideal for finer applications, such as setting smaller tiles.

Versatile Blade - The two straight edges of the versatile trowel are designed for finishing off by smoothing or levelling out the mortar before setting tiles or can be used to cut off any excess material or unwanted adhesive.
Soft-Grip Handle - Fitted with a soft-grip handle, this trowel offers user comfort and ease, even during prolonged use, making it easier to handle and operate.
description: The Faithfull Notched Trowel is designed for applying and spreading adhesive, prior to the setting of wall or floor tiles. The blade is manufactured from high-quality stainless steel for smooth and clean application, whilst offering maximum durability and long working life. With 6mm notches, this trowel evenly spreads adhesives and thin-set mortar across surfaces with good coverage and controlled application without excessive build-up, ideal for finer applications, such as setting smaller tiles. The two straight edges of the versatile trowel are designed for finishing off by smoothing or levelling out the mortar before setting tiles or can be used to cut off any excess material or unwanted adhesive. Fitted with a soft-grip handle, this trowel offers user comfort and ease, even during prolonged use, making it easier to handle and operate. The Faithfull Notched Trowel provides efficient adhesive coverage, faster work, and improved bonding for various construction and renovation tasks.
